name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTemporalResolution derives substep requirements for transient hover surface wake probes.
note: Primary audit surface for temporal CFD probe resolution.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit supplies rotor-resolved surface wake arrival time bands.
note: Transit timing input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceProbeMap supplies rotor-resolved ground and ceiling probe identities.
note: Spatial probe identity input.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies hover induced and far-wake velocity context used upstream.
note: Wake velocity source input.

name: minecraft_tick_reference
value: The 20 Hz Minecraft tick is included only as a low-rate diagnostic contrast for transient wake timing.
note: Low-rate frame reference.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for live transient wake arrival and temporal-resolution validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.
